periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 76. Southwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

periods.name: Saturday
periods.short_forecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 8am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 89. West wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

periods.name: Saturday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 2am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 74. Northeast wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

periods.name: Sunday
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of rain showers before 11am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 83. Northeast wind 7 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
